entities.name: nivolumab
entities.context: nivolumab (1 mg per kilogram) plus ipilimumab (3 mg per kilogram) every 3 weeks for four doses, followed by nivolumab (3 mg per kilogram every 2 weeks)

entities.name: ipilimumab
entities.context: ipilimumab (3 mg per kilogram every 3 weeks for four doses)

entities.name: PDCD1
entities.context: Nivolumab is a well-established anti-PD-1 monoclonal antibody (implied by drug identity)

entities.name: CTLA4
entities.context: Ipilimumab is a well-established anti-CTLA-4 monoclonal antibody (implied by drug identity)

entities.name: melanoma
entities.context: patients with previously untreated advanced melanoma

entities.name: The New England Journal of Medicine

attributes.title: Five-Year Survival with Combined Nivolumab and Ipilimumab in Advanced Melanoma

entities.context: The New England journal of medicine (2019) PMID: 31562797

entities.name: overall survival
entities.context: Overall survival at 5 years was 52% in the nivolumab-plus-ipilimumab group and 44% in the nivolumab group, as compared with 26% in the ipilimumab group

entities.name: progression-free survival
entities.context: Nivolumab plus ipilimumab or nivolumab alone resulted in longer progression-free and overall survival than ipilimumab alone

relations.evidence: Nivolumab is a well-established anti-PD-1 monoclonal antibody (implied by drug identity)
Ipilimumab is a well-established anti-CTLA-4 monoclonal antibody (implied by drug identity)
Sustained long-term overall survival at 5 years was observed with nivolumab plus ipilimumab or nivolumab alone compared with ipilimumab alone
patients with previously untreated advanced melanoma to receive nivolumab...or ipilimumab

the median overall survival was more than 60.0 months in the nivolumab-plus-ipilimumab group and 36.9 months in the nivolumab group, as compared with 19.9 months in the ipilimumab group
Nivolumab plus ipilimumab or nivolumab alone resulted in longer progression-free and overall survival than ipilimumab alone
